ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price in Euro */,
  "not_full_market_price" TEXT /* Indicator if the price is full market price */,
  "vat_exclusive" TEXT /* Indicates whether VAT is exclusive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "date_of_sale" TEXT /* Date of sale */,
  "price_with_vat" REAL /* Sale price inclusive of VAT */,
  "rppi" REAL /* Residential Property Price Index */,
  "price_at_dec2019" REAL /* Price at December 2019 */,
  "month_of_sale" TEXT /* Month of sale in YYYY-MM format */,
  "log_of_price" REAL /* Logarithmic transformation of the sale price */,
  "z_score" REAL /* Z-score of property sale price */,
  "price_without_vat" REAL /* Price without VAT */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the property types table */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_footage" REAL /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the property lot in square meters */,
  "garage" TEXT /* Indicates if the property has a garage and its type (e.g., Yes, No, Attached, Detached) */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system (e.g., Central, Electric) */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system (e.g., Central, Window Units) */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the agents table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the agent operates */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the real estate agency the agent belongs to */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the agencies table */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the real estate business */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., Residential, Commercial) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agent based on client feedback (0-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who handled the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale transaction */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent on the sale */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the sale price that is the commission */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the clients table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the county belongs to (e.g., East, West, North, South) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the county */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for market analysis entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis report */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in the county */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price of properties in the county */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Percentage change in property prices */,
  "median_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Median number of days properties were on the market */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Total number of sales in the county during the analysis period */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Total number of properties currently on the market */,
  "price_per_square_foot" REAL /* Average price per square foot of properties in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded price */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property on the recorded date */,
  "price_adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the price adjustments table */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the price change (e.g., Market Conditions, VAT Adjustment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_histories_price_adjustment_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_adjustment_id") REFERENCES price_adjustments ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_histories_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role identifier linking to user roles */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the counties table to identify the user's operating county */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., Apartment, Detached House) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price adjustment */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being adjusted */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., VAT, Market) */,
  "adjustment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the adjustment made */,
  "date_of_adjustment" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was applied */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the price adjustment */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table to identify who approved the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Monthly Sales, Annual Trends) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing analysis */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final, Archived) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the counties table to specify the county the report covers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
